entry.title: Macho habis! 4 aktor kacak tunjuk skill tunggang kuda di paddock

link.title: Macho habis! 4 aktor kacak tunjuk skill tunggang kuda di paddock

entry.content: Wow! hebat betul Ashraf Muslim, Johan As’ari, Idzham Ismail dan Riz Amin tunggang kuda… baru tahu rupa-rupanya sukan berkuda ni tak ada la mahal sangat #bizibody
entry.summary: Wow! hebat betul Ashraf Muslim, Johan As’ari, Idzham Ismail dan Riz Amin tunggang kuda… baru tahu rupa-rupanya sukan berkuda ni tak ada la mahal sangat #bizibody

entry.title: ‘Naja Talk Show by Céline Victoria Fotso’ - Teaser

link.title: ‘Naja Talk Show by Céline Victoria Fotso’ - Teaser

entry.content:
En juillet dernier, Je Wanda & Co et NAJA International Group Production annonçaient un partenariat audiovisuel stratégique et inédit entre leurs deux structures. Le premier né de leur mariage d’expertises s’apprête ainsi à voir le jour.
En effet, les deux pure players* camerounais ont opté pour un Talk Show qui sera diffusé sur leurs plateformes en ligne respectives à savoir : Je Wanda et NAJA TV.
"Naja Talk Show by Céline Victoria Fotso," est un écrin de conversations en très bonne compagnie sur l’amour, l’amitié, la famille, la vie, les réseaux sociaux, l’entrepreunariat… Bref, tout ce qui anime les discussions de la génération Y africaine (les milléniaux) au quotidien.
Un programme divertissant mais qui nourrit l’esprit annoncé pour ce mois de septembre 2020.
Céline Victoria Fotso est habillée par Black Barbie Shop : www.instagram.com/blackbarbyshop/
www.jewanda.com
www.celinefotso.com
entry.summary: En juillet dernier, Je Wanda & Co et NAJA International Group Production annonçaient un partenariat audiovisuel stratégique et inédit entre leurs deux structures. Le premier né de leur mariage d’expertises s’apprête ainsi à voir le jour. En effet, les deux pure players* camerounais ont opté pour un Talk Show qui sera diffusé sur leurs plateformes en ligne respectives à savoir : Je Wanda et NAJA TV. "Naja Talk Show by Céline Victoria Fotso," est un écrin de conversations en très bonne compagnie sur l’amour, l’amitié, la famille, la vie, les réseaux sociaux, l’entrepreunariat… Bref, tout ce qui anime les discussions de la génération Y africaine (les milléniaux) au quotidien. Un programme divertissant mais qui nourrit l’esprit annoncé pour ce mois de septembre 2020. Céline Victoria Fotso est habillée par Black Barbie Shop : www.instagram.com/blackbarbyshop/ www.jewanda.com www.celinefotso.com

entry.title: Rhea Chakraborty denies claims of living off Sushant Singh Rajput: ‘He lived king size’

link.title: Rhea Chakraborty denies claims of living off Sushant Singh Rajput: ‘He lived king size’

entry.content: Denying allegations that Rhea and her family were living off Sushant, Rhea said that her 2019 Paris trip had been arranged by a company that had hired her for a fashion shoot, but Sushant insisted that they make the most of it. She said that she has proof to back up all her claims. Rhea said that she isn’t a ‘social-climber’ and mentioned that a year previously, Sushant had gone to Thailand with six friends – all men – and had spent Rs 70 lakh. “He went in a private jet, these were his lifestyle choices,” she said.
entry.summary: Denying allegations that Rhea and her family were living off Sushant, Rhea said that her 2019 Paris trip had been arranged by a company that had hired her for a fashion shoot, but Sushant insisted that they make the most of it. She said that she has proof to back up all her claims. Rhea said that she isn’t a ‘social-climber’ and mentioned that a year previously, Sushant had gone to Thailand with six friends – all men – and had spent Rs 70 lakh. “He went in a private jet, these were his lifestyle choices,” she said.

entry.title: Gérald Darmanin battu dans la course au buzz par un jeune rappeur?

link.title: Gérald Darmanin battu dans la course au buzz par un jeune rappeur?

entry.content: Le ministre de l’Intérieur est-il tombé à pieds joints dans le piège tendu par un jeune rappeur en mal de notoriété ? En précipitant le déclenchement d’une opération de police dans le quartier du Mistral à Grenoble, le 26 août, après la diffusion de vidéos mettant en scène des hommes lourdement armés près d’un point de deal, Gérald Darmanin disait vouloir mettre un terme à "l’ensauvagement d’une minorité de la société". Une semaine après son coup de com, le ministre doit aujourd’hui répondre aux doutes grandissants sur la réalité des faits dénoncés.
entry.summary: Le ministre de l’Intérieur est-il tombé à pieds joints dans le piège tendu par un jeune rappeur en mal de notoriété ? En précipitant le déclenchement d’une opération de police dans le quartier du Mistral à Grenoble, le 26 août, après la diffusion de vidéos mettant en scène des hommes lourdement armés près d’un point de deal, Gérald Darmanin disait vouloir mettre un terme à "l’ensauvagement d’une minorité de la société". Une semaine après son coup de com, le ministre doit aujourd’hui répondre aux doutes grandissants sur la réalité des faits dénoncés.

entry.title: Jalan Episode 12 - Presented by Ariel - 2nd September 2020 - ARY Digital - YouTube

link.title: Jalan Episode 12 - Presented by Ariel - 2nd September 2020 - ARY Digital - YouTube

entry.content:
Jalan depicts the extent to which a person can go in jealousy and greed.
Directed By: Aabis Raza
Written By: Sidra Sehar Imran
Cast:
Minal Khan
Areeba Habib
Emmad Irfani
Fahad Sheikh
Mohammed Ahmed
Sajida Syed
Nadia Hussain
Maira Khan
Sabiha Hashmi
Hajra Yamin
Watch Jalan Every Wednesday at 8:00 PM, only on ARY Digital.
#Jalan #PresentedbyAriel #MinalKhan
#MinalKhan #AreebaHabib #EmmadIrfani #FahadSheikh
ARY Digital Official YouTube Channel, For more video subscribe our channel and for suggestion please use the comment section.

entry.title: PEP Rewind: Alex Medina, Jerald Napoles, Nicco Manalo show off their special talent

link.title: PEP Rewind: Alex Medina, Jerald Napoles, Nicco Manalo show off their special talent

entry.content:
Promoting their 2014 Cinemalaya filmfest action film "The Janitor," Alex Medina, Jerald Napoles, and Nicco Manalo dropped by the PEP.ph (Philippine Entertainment Portal) office for an interview.
But their visit turned out more than just promoting one of the best films in said filmfest that year.
Alex, Jerald, and Nicco had fun answering questions from PEPtalk hosts Jocelyn Dimaculangan and Rommel R. Llanes.
They even gave one of the most unforgettable impromptu song and dance performances in PEPtalk.
Watch!
For the rest of their PEPtalk interview, click on the links:
Part 1:
Part 2:
entry.summary: Promoting their 2014 Cinemalaya filmfest action film "The Janitor," Alex Medina, Jerald Napoles, and Nicco Manalo dropped by the PEP.ph (Philippine Entertainment Portal) office for an interview. But their visit turned out more than just promoting one of the best films in said filmfest that year. Alex, Jerald, and Nicco had fun answering questions from PEPtalk hosts Jocelyn Dimaculangan and Rommel R. Llanes. They even gave one of the most unforgettable impromptu song and dance performances in PEPtalk. Watch! For the rest of their PEPtalk interview, click on the links: Part 1: Part 2:

entry.title: Plan de relance : les 8 points à retenir de la présentation de Jean Castex

link.title: Plan de relance : les 8 points à retenir de la présentation de Jean Castex

entry.content:
Protection du pacte social, lutte contre la récession, transformation de l’économie… Le plan baptisé "France relance" devrait avoir un "effet d’entraînement sur le reste de l’économie". Il "produira des effets concrets et perceptibles pour le plus grand nombre", a promis Jean Castex.
Retrouver toute l’actualité, les reportages, les enquêtes, les opinions et les débats de "L’Obs" sur notre site :
entry.summary: Protection du pacte social, lutte contre la récession, transformation de l’économie… Le plan baptisé "France relance" devrait avoir un "effet d’entraînement sur le reste de l’économie". Il "produira des effets concrets et perceptibles pour le plus grand nombre", a promis Jean Castex. Retrouver toute l’actualité, les reportages, les enquêtes, les opinions et les débats de "L’Obs" sur notre site :

entry.title: Phoolan Devi - Queen of the Chambal%2C end of the line for the daciot turned politician

link.title: Phoolan Devi - Queen of the Chambal%2C end of the line for the daciot turned politician

entry.content: Mulayam Singh, leader Samajwadi Party says family of Phoolan Devi is sad now. Phoolan Devi was a brave lady. She was very popular among the people. On 25 July 2001, Phoolan Devi was shot dead by three masked gunmen outside of her Delhi bungalow. She was hit five times: three shots to her head and two to her body. The gunmen fled the scene in a Maruti car. She was taken to a nearby hospital but was declared dead. The prime suspect, Sher Singh Rana (alias Pankaj Singh), later surrendered to the police. Rana allegedly claimed to have murdered Phoolan Devi in revenge for the men she gunned down in the Behmai massacre. In the latest ruling, on August 14, 2014, the court sentenced Rana to life in prison and a fine. This footage is part of the broadcast stock footage archive of Wilderness Films India Ltd., the largest collection of HD imagery from South Asia. The collection comprises of 150, 000+ hours of high quality broadcast imagery, mostly shot on 4K, 200 fps slow motion, Full HD, HDCAM 1080i High Definition, Alexa and XDCAM. Write to us for licensing this footage on a broadcast format, for use in your production! We are happy to be commissioned to film for you or else provide you with broadcast crewing and production solutions across South Asia. We pride ourselves in bringing the best of India and South Asia to the world… Please subscribe to our channel wildfilmsindia on Youtube www.youtube.com/wildfilmsindia for a steady stream of videos from across India. Also, visit and enjoy your journey across India at www.clipahoy.com , India’s first video-based social networking experience. Reach us at rupindang [at] gmail [dot] com and admin@wildfilmsindia.com To SUBSCRIBE click the below link: www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=WildFilmsIndia Like & Follow Us on: Facebook: www.facebook.com/WildernessFilmsIndiaLimited Website: www.wildfilmsindia.com
entry.summary: Mulayam Singh, leader Samajwadi Party says family of Phoolan Devi is sad now. Phoolan Devi was a brave lady. She was very popular among the people. On 25 July 2001, Phoolan Devi was shot dead by three masked gunmen outside of her Delhi bungalow. She was hit five times: three shots to her head and two to her body. The gunmen fled the scene in a Maruti car. She was taken to a nearby hospital but was declared dead. The prime suspect, Sher Singh Rana (alias Pankaj Singh), later surrendered to the police. Rana allegedly claimed to have murdered Phoolan Devi in revenge for the men she gunned down in the Behmai massacre. In the latest ruling, on August 14, 2014, the court sentenced Rana to life in prison and a fine. This footage is part of the broadcast stock footage archive of Wilderness Films India Ltd., the largest collection of HD imagery from South Asia. The collection comprises of 150, 000+ hours of high quality broadcast imagery, mostly shot on 4K, 200 fps slow motion, Full HD, HDCAM 1080i High Definition, Alexa and XDCAM. Write to us for licensing this footage on a broadcast format, for use in your production! We are happy to be commissioned to film for you or else provide you with broadcast crewing and production solutions across South Asia. We pride ourselves in bringing the best of India and South Asia to the world… Please subscribe to our channel wildfilmsindia on Youtube www.youtube.com/wildfilmsindia for a steady stream of videos from across India. entry.title: Netflix-Doku „Rising Phoenix’: Prinz Harry gibt sein Film-Debüt

link.title: Netflix-Doku „Rising Phoenix’: Prinz Harry gibt sein Film-Debüt

entry.content: Prinz Harry gab vor kurzem sein Film-Debüt. Der Ex-Royal ist Teil der neuen Netflix-Doku „Rising Phoenix". Die Produktion beschäftigt sich mit den Ursprüngen der Paralympischen Spiele. Der Prinz rührte schon mal kräftig die Werbetrommel und erklärte, warum ihm das Thema so am Herzen liegt.
entry.summary: Prinz Harry gab vor kurzem sein Film-Debüt. Der Ex-Royal ist Teil der neuen Netflix-Doku „Rising Phoenix". Die Produktion beschäftigt sich mit den Ursprüngen der Paralympischen Spiele. Der Prinz rührte schon mal kräftig die Werbetrommel und erklärte, warum ihm das Thema so am Herzen liegt.

entry.title: IPL 2020: Chennai Super Kings spinner Harbhajan Singh pulls out of entire tournament Oneindia News

link.title: IPL 2020: Chennai Super Kings spinner Harbhajan Singh pulls out of entire tournament Oneindia News

entry.content: Veteran off-spinner Harbhajan Singh has pulled out of the IPL 2020 due to personal reasons. Harbhajan Singh has conveyed his decision to the CSK on Friday. He became the second CSK player after Suresh Raina to withdraw his name from this year’s IPL, citing personal reasons. While Raina had returned home after travelling with the team to the UAE, Harbhajan had remained in India. The development comes on the back of some positive news for the Chennai franchise.
entry.summary: Veteran off-spinner Harbhajan Singh has pulled out of the IPL 2020 due to personal reasons. Harbhajan Singh has conveyed his decision to the CSK on Friday. He became the second CSK player after Suresh Raina to withdraw his name from this year’s IPL, citing personal reasons. While Raina had returned home after travelling with the team to the UAE, Harbhajan had remained in India. The development comes on the back of some positive news for the Chennai franchise.

entry.title: ಇದ್ದಕ್ಕಿದ್ದಂತೆ ಮತ್ತೆ ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಗೆ ದಾಖಲಾದ DK ಶಿವಕುಮಾರ್ Oneindia Kannada

link.title: ಇದ್ದಕ್ಕಿದ್ದಂತೆ ಮತ್ತೆ ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಗೆ ದಾಖಲಾದ DK ಶಿವಕುಮಾರ್ Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ಕೆಪಿಸಿಸಿ ಅಧ್ಯಕ್ಷ ಡಿ. ಕೆ. ಶಿವಕುಮಾರ್ ಮತ್ತೆ ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಗೆ ದಾಖಲಾಗಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಕೋವಿಡ್ ಸೋಂಕಿನಿಂದ ಗುಣಮುಖಗೊಂಡಿದ್ದ ಅವರು ಆಗಸ್ಟ್ 31ರಂದು ಡಿಸ್ಚಾರ್ಜ್ ಆಗಿದ್ದರು.
#DKShivakumar #Hospitalised
Due to fever and cough Karnataka Pradesh Congress Committee (KPCC) president D. K. Shivakumar admitted to hospital. He discharged from hospital on August 31 after recovering from Covid-19.
entry.summary: ಕೆಪಿಸಿಸಿ ಅಧ್ಯಕ್ಷ ಡಿ. ಕೆ. ಶಿವಕುಮಾರ್ ಮತ್ತೆ ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಗೆ ದಾಖಲಾಗಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಕೋವಿಡ್ ಸೋಂಕಿನಿಂದ ಗುಣಮುಖಗೊಂಡಿದ್ದ ಅವರು ಆಗಸ್ಟ್ 31ರಂದು ಡಿಸ್ಚಾರ್ಜ್ ಆಗಿದ್ದರು. #DKShivakumar #Hospitalised Due to fever and cough Karnataka Pradesh Congress Committee (KPCC) president D. K. Shivakumar admitted to hospital. He discharged from hospital on August 31 after recovering from Covid-19.

entry.title: Dr Kafeel Khanಗೆ ಕೊನೆಗೂ ಬಿಡುಗಡೆ Oneindia Kannada

link.title: Dr Kafeel Khanಗೆ ಕೊನೆಗೂ ಬಿಡುಗಡೆ Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ರಾಷ್ಟ್ರೀಯ ಭದ್ರತಾ ಕಾಯ್ದೆಯಡಿ ಬಂಧನಕ್ಕೊಳಗಾಗಿ ಜೈಲಿನಲ್ಲಿದ್ದ ಡಾ. ಕಫೀಲ್ ಖಾನ್ ಗೆ ಅಲಹಾಬಾದ್ ಹೈಕೋರ್ಟ್ ಕಡೆಗೂ ಷರತ್ತು ಬದ್ಧ ಜಾಮೀನನ್ನು ಇಂದು ಮಂಜೂರು ಮಾಡಿದೆ.
#KafeelKhan #UP
Kafeel Khan the Uttar Pradesh doctor jailed under the tough National Security Act NSA for an alleged speech against the Citizenship Amendment Act or CAA was freed from a jail in Mathura at midnight on Wednesday.
entry.summary: ರಾಷ್ಟ್ರೀಯ ಭದ್ರತಾ ಕಾಯ್ದೆಯಡಿ ಬಂಧನಕ್ಕೊಳಗಾಗಿ ಜೈಲಿನಲ್ಲಿದ್ದ ಡಾ. ಕಫೀಲ್ ಖಾನ್ ಗೆ ಅಲಹಾಬಾದ್ ಹೈಕೋರ್ಟ್ ಕಡೆಗೂ ಷರತ್ತು ಬದ್ಧ ಜಾಮೀನನ್ನು ಇಂದು ಮಂಜೂರು ಮಾಡಿದೆ. #KafeelKhan #UP Kafeel Khan the Uttar Pradesh doctor jailed under the tough National Security Act NSA for an alleged speech against the Citizenship Amendment Act or CAA was freed from a jail in Mathura at midnight on Wednesday.

entry.title: Koh-Lanta, les 4 Terres : Diane sublime et sexy en maillot de bain sur Instagram

link.title: Koh-Lanta, les 4 Terres : Diane sublime et sexy en maillot de bain sur Instagram

entry.content: C’est le jour du grand lancement de "Koh-Lanta, les 4 Terres" sur TF1. Ce vendredi 28 août, l’aventure démarre aux Fidji avec quatre nouvelles équipes, soit 24 nouveaux candidats au casting. Parmi eux, la jolie Diane, qui ne manque pas de partager son quotidien sur Instagram. Il y a quelques jours, la jeune femme a partagé une photo d’elle en maillot de bain.
entry.summary: C’est le jour du grand lancement de "Koh-Lanta, les 4 Terres" sur TF1. Ce vendredi 28 août, l’aventure démarre aux Fidji avec quatre nouvelles équipes, soit 24 nouveaux candidats au casting. Parmi eux, la jolie Diane, qui ne manque pas de partager son quotidien sur Instagram. Il y a quelques jours, la jeune femme a partagé une photo d’elle en maillot de bain.

entry.title: Port du masque : de plus en plus de femmes délaissent le rouge à lèvres et le fond de teint

link.title: Port du masque : de plus en plus de femmes délaissent le rouge à lèvres et le fond de teint

entry.content:
Le port du masque devient progressivement la règle à l’intérieur comme à l’extérieur. Si bien que de nombreuses femmes décident d’arrêter le rouge à lèvres. Elles misent désormais davantage sur le mascara, et le marché des cosmétiques s’en trouve bouleversé.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Le port du masque devient progressivement la règle à l’intérieur comme à l’extérieur. Si bien que de nombreuses femmes décident d’arrêter le rouge à lèvres. Elles misent désormais davantage sur le mascara, et le marché des cosmétiques s’en trouve bouleversé. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Ralph Macchio Breaks Down His Career, from ‘Karate Kid’ to ‘Cobra Kai’

link.title: Ralph Macchio Breaks Down His Career, from ‘Karate Kid’ to ‘Cobra Kai’

entry.content: Ralph Macchio takes us through his legendary acting career, breaking down his roles in ‘Up the Academy,’ ‘Eight Is Enough,’ ‘The Outsiders,’ ‘The Karate Kid,’ ‘The Karate Kid Part II,’ ‘My Cousin Vinny,’ ‘Ugly Betty,’ ‘The Deuce’ and ‘Cobra Kai.’
entry.summary: Ralph Macchio takes us through his legendary acting career, breaking down his roles in ‘Up the Academy,’ ‘Eight Is Enough,’ ‘The Outsiders,’ ‘The Karate Kid,’ ‘The Karate Kid Part II,’ ‘My Cousin Vinny,’ ‘Ugly Betty,’ ‘The Deuce’ and ‘Cobra Kai.’

entry.title: Eslabon Armado ‘Con Tus Besos’ Letra Oficial Y Significado Verified

link.title: Eslabon Armado ‘Con Tus Besos’ Letra Oficial Y Significado Verified

entry.content: Eslabon Armado’s “Con Tus Besos” has found a strong audience with 20 million YouTube views to date. On the track, which appears on ‘Tu Veneno Mortal’, Eslabon Armado was inspired to sing about love after watching ‘The Notebook.’
entry.summary: Eslabon Armado’s “Con Tus Besos” has found a strong audience with 20 million YouTube views to date. On the track, which appears on ‘Tu Veneno Mortal’, Eslabon Armado was inspired to sing about love after watching ‘The Notebook.’

entry.title: Bollywood and Underworld - Bharat Shah investigates, Salman Khan called for clarification

link.title: Bollywood and Underworld - Bharat Shah investigates, Salman Khan called for clarification

entry.content: The connection of Bollywood and the Underworld has been a subject of thrilling and also the root of many cases in the film industry. In the case of alleged nexus by Nazim Rizvi and Bharat Shah and few others with the underworld. The search at the offices and property by the Mumbai Police. Reporters pressing the police officers even after their request to talk to the superiors. Reporters and cameraman swarm one of the buildings belonging to Bharat Shah and his VIP enterprises, a business and film production house. During a press conference Police clarifies the actions taken towards Bharat Shah following the allegations. Police also slams the media for creating panic in the film industry by writing stories of arresting Bollywood actors and personalities. The police officer also recounts incidents involving film personalities and the Underworld and stressed on the service of Mumbai Police in trying to curb the Underworld. In the making of the movie ‘Chori Chori Chupke’ starring Salman Khan, Preity Zinta and Rani Mukerji, the producer Nazim Rizvi and his associate businessman Bharat Shah were accused of their links with the underworld. This footage is part of the broadcast stock footage archive of Wilderness Films India Ltd., the largest HD and 4K collection from South Asia. The collection comprises of 150, 000+ hours of high quality broadcast imagery, mostly shot on 4K, 200 fps slow motion and Full HD. Write to us for licensing this footage on a broadcast format, for use in your production! We are happy to be commissioned to film for you or else provide you with broadcast crewing and production solutions across South Asia. We pride ourselves in bringing the best of India and South Asia to the world… Please subscribe to our channel wildfilmsindia on Youtube and The Best of India at for a steady stream of videos from across India. Also, visit and enjoy your journey across India at www.clipahoy.com , India’s first video-based social networking experience. Reach us at rupindang [at] gmail [dot] com and admin@wildfilmsindia.com To SUBSCRIBE click the below link: and Like & Follow Us on: Facebook: Website: #WildFilmsIndia #WildernessFilmsIndia #BroadcastStockFootage
entry.summary: The connection of Bollywood and the Underworld has been a subject of thrilling and also the root of many cases in the film industry. In the case of alleged nexus by Nazim Rizvi and Bharat Shah and few others with the underworld. The search at the offices and property by the Mumbai Police. Reporters pressing the police officers even after their request to talk to the superiors. Reporters and cameraman swarm one of the buildings belonging to Bharat Shah and his VIP enterprises, a business and film production house. During a press conference Police clarifies the actions taken towards Bharat Shah following the allegations. Police also slams the media for creating panic in the film industry by writing stories of arresting Bollywood actors and personalities. The police officer also recounts incidents involving film personalities and the Underworld and stressed on the service of Mumbai Police in trying to curb the Underworld. In the making of the movie ‘Chori Chori Chupke’ starring Salman Khan, Preity Zinta and Rani Mukerji, the producer Nazim Rizvi and his associate businessman Bharat Shah were accused of their links with the underworld. This footage is part of the broadcast stock footage archive of Wilderness Films India Ltd., the largest HD and 4K collection from South Asia. The collection comprises of 150, 000+ hours of high quality broadcast imagery, mostly shot on 4K, 200 fps slow motion and Full HD. Write to us for licensing this footage on a broadcast format, for use in your production! We are happy to be commissioned to film for you or else provide you with broadcast crewing and production solutions across South Asia. We pride ourselves in bringing the best of India and South Asia to the world… Please subscribe to our channel wildfilmsindia on Youtube and The Best of India at for a steady stream of videos from across India. Also, visit and enjoy your journey across India at www.clipahoy.com , India’s first video-based social networking experience. Reach us at rupindang [at] gmail [dot] com and admin@wildfilmsindia.com To SUBSCRIBE click the below link: and Like & Follow Us on: Facebook: Website: #WildFilmsIndia #WildernessFilmsIndia #BroadcastStockFootage

entry.title: Sushant Rajput Case: Rhea Chakraborty का Polygraph Test करवा सकती है CBI वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Sushant Rajput Case: Rhea Chakraborty का Polygraph Test करवा सकती है CBI वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Sushant Singh Rajput’s death case is being investigated by CBI and as per the latest reports by Times Now, the Central agency is mulling the use of polygraph tests of prime suspects. As per The Times Now report, the test will be done on Rhea Chakraborty, her family members, Siddharth Pithani, Neeraj, Samuel Miranda, and others who are being questioned by the investigating agency. Watch video,
सुशांत सिंह राजपूत की मौत मामले की जांच सीबीआई कर रही है. सीबीआई रिया चक्रवर्ती से आज फिर पुछताछ कर रही है.. सीबीआई ने शुक्रवार को इस केस में आरोपी सुशांत की गर्लफ्रेंड रिया चक्रवर्ती से पूछताछ की थी. अब जानकारी मिल रही है कि जांच एजेंसी रिया चक्रवर्ती का पॉलीग्राफ टेस्ट करवा सकती है. 2-3 दौर की पूछताछ के बाद अब सीबीआई रिया का पॉलीग्राफ टेस्ट कराने की तैयारी में है. सीबीआई को इसके लिए कोर्ट से इजाजत लेनी होगी. देखें वीडियो
#SushantRajputCase #RheaChakraborty #CBI
entry.summary: Sushant Singh Rajput’s death case is being investigated by CBI and as per the latest reports by Times Now, the Central agency is mulling the use of polygraph tests of prime suspects. As per The Times Now report, the test will be done on Rhea Chakraborty, her family members, Siddharth Pithani, Neeraj, Samuel Miranda, and others who are being questioned by the investigating agency. Watch video, सुशांत सिंह राजपूत की मौत मामले की जांच सीबीआई कर रही है. सीबीआई रिया चक्रवर्ती से आज फिर पुछताछ कर रही है.. सीबीआई ने शुक्रवार को इस केस में आरोपी सुशांत की गर्लफ्रेंड रिया चक्रवर्ती से पूछताछ की थी. अब जानकारी मिल रही है कि जांच एजेंसी रिया चक्रवर्ती का पॉलीग्राफ टेस्ट करवा सकती है. 2-3 दौर की पूछताछ के बाद अब सीबीआई रिया का पॉलीग्राफ टेस्ट कराने की तैयारी में है. सीबीआई को इसके लिए कोर्ट से इजाजत लेनी होगी. देखें वीडियो #SushantRajputCase #RheaChakraborty #CBI
